Cases.SQL: select * from fts_t where fts_match_word('hello', title)
select * from fts_t where fts_match_word('hello', title) and id > 1
select * from fts_t where fts_match_word('hello', title) order by fts_match_word('hello', title) desc limit 10
select id, fts_match_word('hello', title) as score from fts_t where fts_match_word('hello', title) order by score desc limit 10
select * from fts_t where fts_match_word('hello', title) order by fts_match_word('hello', title) desc, id limit 10
select fts_match_word('hello', title) from fts_t where fts_match_word('hello', title)
select fts_match_word('hello', title), id from fts_t where fts_match_word('hello', title) order by fts_match_word('hello', title) desc limit 10
select * from fts_t where fts_match_word('hello', title)
